notes: 7G7 item 2. Differentiates from py-snake by the C memory-discipline contract (no allocation after init, ring-buffer body over fixed arrays, self-contained struct, caller-provided render buffer) pinned in the prompt per catalog. All pinned frames and tick return sequences generated from an independent Python oracle implementing the stated rules (tail-vacate legality, eat-tick tail freeze, reversal vs last-moved direction, frozen death frame).
